name: Gaurav Deori
bio: I build clean, modern, user-friendly websites through real-world projects and creative leadership.

about.title: Building the web, one project at a time.
paragraphs: I'm an aspiring Web Developer focused on crafting clean, modern, and responsive websites. My core stack includes HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Tailwind CSS—tools I use to bring ideas to life.

I believe in learning by doing. Every project is an opportunity to grow, experiment, and push my skills further. From simple landing pages to more complex web applications, I approach each challenge with curiosity and determination.

Beyond coding, I'm the Founder of Theposterzz—a creative initiative where we design and sell high-quality posters, social media content, and visual identities for individuals and student communities. This blend of design and development gives me a unique perspective on building user-centric digital experiences.

projects.title: AttendanceHub
projects.description: An advanced AI-powered attendance tracker for students to manage subject-wise attendance and percentage with seamless routine integration.

projects.title: Amar Adda
projects.description: A modern street food ordering platform designed to bring traditional tastes to the digital age with a seamless ordering experience.

projects.title: QR Shield AI
projects.description: An AI-powered security tool that scans and detects malicious QR codes, ensuring safer browsing and digital payments by analyzing URL patterns and potential threats.

projects.title: Theposterzz
projects.description: A creative branding initiative where we design and sell high-quality posters for individuals and student communities. Building visual identities that stand out.

projects.title: Echoes of Poba
projects.description: A student-led initiative documenting and showcasing the beauty of the Poba rainforest. Built to raise awareness and inspire conservation.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio (v1)
projects.description: My first portfolio website, built from scratch using pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. A milestone project that marked my journey into web development.
